title: From Aimless to Essential - Find Purpose

current_reality.situation: 18-25 years old, no career path, uncertain future
current_reality.daily_life: Maybe college (unsure why), maybe low-wage job, maybe parents' basement
current_reality.earnings: $0-$30k/year, probably in debt if in college
current_reality.extraction: Student loans if college, dead-end job if working, parental support if neither
current_reality.prospects: Unclear - job market hostile, economy rigged, climate doomed, war looming
current_reality.soul_cost: Paralyzed by uncertainty, depressed by future prospects, nihilistic about meaning
current_reality.future: Maybe degree leading nowhere, maybe debt forever, maybe just... drift until death

immediate: No idea what to do with life
Every career path seems pointless or soul-crushing
Climate change makes long-term planning feel absurd
Job market: entry level requires 5 years experience
Crippling student debt for education that doesn't lead to jobs
deeper: System designed for Boomers, not you
Will inherit dying planet, collapsing economy, endless wars
Told to 'find your passion' but all options lead to wage slavery
Want to matter but no idea how
Older generations ruined everything, now lecture you to 'just work hard'
Feel like there's no point - why build life in world that's ending?
existential: World ending due to climate/war/collapse - why try?
Even if succeed in career, just enriching parasites
Will work 50 years to retire into destroyed world
No purpose, no meaning, no hope
Die having been born too late to explore Earth, too early to explore space, just in time to watch everything collapse

immediate_provisions.shelter: BARRACKS - exploration pods, mentors on tap. Azure/TRUTH scoring keeps time-wasters in rugged quarters until they show follow-through while Crimson/TASTE lets you swap guilds, quests, and learning rhythms via Sorting Hat lobbies detailed in foundations/BARRACKS sorting dual-layer.md and organized through the 23 COMMAND duty bands.
immediate_provisions.food: TRUTH food - brain fuel, no instant ramen
immediate_provisions.purpose: FINALLY - reason to exist that matters

what_you'll_do: Learn while building - agriculture, engineering, coordination, whatever interests you
Surrounded by mentors - experts teaching on the ground
Try different roles - not stuck in one career, explore
Physical + mental work - vary by day, find what fits
Meaningful from day one - not 'paying dues', actually building paradise
why_it_works_for_you: No experience required - learn as you go, mentors guide
No degree required - ability matters, credentials don't
No debt - not paying to learn, paid to learn via tokens
No uncertainty - clear mission, defined timeline, guaranteed outcome
Actually MATTERS - not pushing papers, building food for all life
the_work.timeline: 2 years - from aimless to essential to wealthy

tokens_of_appreciation.comparison: College: $100k debt + uncertain job vs BARRACKS: $0 debt + $150M+
tokens_of_appreciation.meaning: Set for life at 20/25 - never worry about money again, do what you want

you're_only_20_or_25: Entire life ahead - wealthy, purposeful, skilled
No debt - started with tokens not loans
Proven yourself - built paradise, not 'entry level'
Options unlimited - with $3M+/year, can do ANYTHING
what_you_could_do: Learn - any subject, any school, funded by tokens
Build - start company, project, organization, whatever
Help - use wealth to fix problems you care about
Next quest - longevity research, space exploration, whatever comes next
Retire at 25 - never work again if you don't want to

the_call.question: Will you drift aimlessly until climate/collapse/war ends you, or build paradise before it's too late?
the_call.invitation: Join millions of young people refusing to accept doomed future - BUILDING better one
the_call.promise: Purpose, community, skills, wealth, hope - everything current system denies you
the_call.urgency: You're young NOW - energy, adaptability, long life to enjoy results - perfect timing
the_call.choice: Drift in doomed system OR build paradise at 20 and retire wealthy at 22 - you decide
